dm_location: Appendix 1 — Development Management Guidelines (Volume 1 Written Statement)
sightline_x_m: 2.4 m (relaxation to 2 m on very lightly trafficked roads)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice: Domestic Waste Water Treatment Systems (p.e. <10) 2021; site suitability/percolation for unsewered single houses
residential_density_dph: No dwellings/ha table; per Sustainable Residential Development Guidelines 2009; low-density max 20% of stock per settlement
separation_distance_m: 1 m minimum between side walls of adjacent buildings; 11 m minimum rear garden depth
public_open_space_pct: No single local % table (per national Sustainable Residential Development guidelines)
car_parking_dwelling: With garage none additional, without 1 space/unit; town centres 1/unit; other areas 1 (1-2 bed)/2 (3 bed)
building_height: Per Urban Development and Building Height Guidelines (2018); no local override numbers
trigger_AA: Screening for any plan/project that may impact a European site (SAC/SPA); NIS/NIR if likely significant effect; IROPI for priority habitat impacts
trigger_EIA: EIAR where Schedule 5 thresholds exceeded; sub-threshold per Schedule 7 where significant effects likely
trigger_FRA: Per SFRA (Vol 10c) and 2009 Guidelines/Circular PL2/2014; sequential approach and Justification Test apply
trigger_AHIA: Not a discrete numeric trigger in Appendix 1; qualitative consideration (Chapter 16)
trigger_TTA: Transport and Mobility Statement for housing developments of 10 units or more; TIA/RSA/RSIA per TII
notes: DM standards are an Appendix, not a numbered chapter. Design Statement required for >3 dwellings or >300 m². Cul-de-sac generally max 35 dwellings; access road may not serve >80 dwellings. Archaeological/tourism EIA-AA-SFRA where required.
